routes.name: EU Blue Card
eligibility_criteria: Recognised university degree or equivalent qualification
Binding job offer or employment contract
Minimum annual gross salary of EUR 43,800 for shortage occupations (IT)
Salary must meet or exceed the threshold — no exceptions

routes.name: National Work Visa (Section 18b AufenthG)
eligibility_criteria: Employment contract with a German employer
Approval from the Federal Employment Agency (BA)

routes.name: Job Seeker Visa
eligibility_criteria: Proof of financial means for the stay (approx EUR 11,208 in blocked account)
Valid for 6 months — must find employment in that period
Cannot work on this visa — must convert to work visa after job offer

required_qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent
language_requirements: English — professional working proficiency (required for most tech roles)
German — A1/A2 helpful for daily life, B1 beneficial for some employers
credentials.degree_equivalency_notes: Indian engineering degrees (B.Tech/B.E.) are generally recognised in Germany. Check anabin database for specific university recognition. IIT/NIT degrees are well-regarded.

market_demand.scale_definition: Scale: low | medium | high | very_high — based on job posting volume, employer sponsorship willingness, and shortage occupation list inclusion. 'high' = role is on the shortage occupation list and/or has significant unfilled positions.
